title: Open the Program File Called MAIN.PRG
description:
Open the Program File Called MAIN.PRG

Open the Program File Called MAIN.PRG

You should already know how to open the main.prg program file since you are familiar with the Epson RC+ 8.0 environment.
  However, for those of you who may not know how to open a file we have included the basic steps below:

Click
	 the [Open File] button
	 on the Epson RC+ 8.0 toolbar.  You will see the following [Open
	 File] dialog box:

The Epson RC+ [Open File] Dialog Box

As
	 you can see in the [Open File] dialog box, the main.prg program file
	 should already be highlighted since you haven't yet created any other
	 programs.  Go ahead and click the [Open] button at the bottom
	 left of the dialog box to open the main.prg program file.
